package rulecoverage

func PositiveMiddlewareCallsRepositoryDirectly() string {
    ruleID := "middleware_calls_repository_directly"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Middleware that reaches into repositories instead of delegating through focused services or auth abstractions."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
